packs.name: agent-a-debugging
packs.problem_class: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior. 4-phase root cause investigation — NO fixes without understanding the problem first.

packs.name: ascii-art
packs.problem_class: Generate ASCII art using pyfiglet (571 fonts), cowsay, boxes, toilet, image-to-ascii, remote APIs (asciified, ascii.co.uk), and LLM fallback. No API keys required.

packs.name: code-review
packs.problem_class: Reviewing code changes (diffs, PRs, or files) for bugs, security vulnerabilities, and quality issues — producing actionable, severity-ranked feedback

packs.name: code-review
packs.problem_class: Guidelines for performing thorough code reviews with security and quality focus

packs.name: codebase-inspection
packs.problem_class: Inspect and analyze codebases using pygount for LOC counting, language breakdown, and code-vs-comment ratios. Use when asked to check lines of code, repo size, language composition, or codebase stats.

packs.name: excalidraw
packs.problem_class: Create hand-drawn style diagrams using Excalidraw JSON format. Generate .excalidraw files for architecture diagrams, flowcharts, sequence diagrams, concept maps, and more. Files can be opened at excalidraw.com or uploaded for shareable links.

packs.name: github-auth
packs.problem_class: Set up GitHub authentication for the agent using git (universally available) or the gh CLI. Covers HTTPS tokens, SSH keys, credential helpers, and gh auth — with a detection flow to pick the right method automatically.

packs.name: github-code-review
packs.problem_class: Review code changes by analyzing git diffs, leaving inline comments on PRs, and performing thorough pre-push review. Works with gh CLI or falls back to git + GitHub REST API via curl.

packs.name: github-issues
packs.problem_class: Create, manage, triage, and close GitHub issues. Search existing issues, add labels, assign people, and link to PRs. Works with gh CLI or falls back to git + GitHub REST API via curl.

packs.name: github-pr-workflow
packs.problem_class: Full pull request lifecycle — create branches, commit changes, open PRs, monitor CI status, auto-fix failures, and merge. Works with gh CLI or falls back to git + GitHub REST API via curl.

packs.name: github-repo-management
packs.problem_class: Clone, create, fork, configure, and manage GitHub repositories. Manage remotes, secrets, releases, and workflows. Works with gh CLI or falls back to git + GitHub REST API via curl.

packs.name: jupyter-live-kernel
packs.problem_class: Use a live Jupyter kernel for stateful, iterative Python execution via hamelnb. Load this skill when the task involves exploration, iteration, or inspecting intermediate results — data science, ML experimentation, API exploration, or building up complex code step-by-step. Uses terminal to run CLI commands against a live Jupyter kernel. No new tools required.

packs.name: plan
packs.problem_class: Plan mode for Hermes — inspect context, write a markdown plan into the active workspace's `.hermes/plans/` directory, and do not execute the work.

packs.name: quick-debug
packs.problem_class: simple debugging

packs.name: requesting-code-review
packs.problem_class: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging. Validates work meets requirements through systematic review process.

packs.name: subagent-driven-development
packs.problem_class: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks. Dispatches fresh delegate_task per task with two-stage review (spec compliance then code quality).

packs.name: systematic-debugging
packs.problem_class: Bug fixing, test failures, unexpected behavior — any technical issue requiring root cause analysis before fix

packs.name: test-driven-development
packs.problem_class: Implementing features or fixing bugs using a test-driven development workflow — writing tests first to define correctness, then implementing the minimal code to pass

packs.name: test-driven-development
packs.problem_class: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code. Enforces RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle with test-first approach.

packs.name: writing-plans
packs.problem_class: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task. Creates comprehensive implementation plans with bite-sized tasks, exact file paths, and complete code examples.

packs.name: code-review
packs.problem_class: Review code changes, pull requests, or existing code for security vulnerabilities, error handling gaps, code quality issues, and testing coverage

packs.name: plan
packs.problem_class: Create a concrete, actionable implementation plan for a software task without executing any changes

packs.name: systematic-debugging
packs.problem_class: Bug fixing, test failures, unexpected behavior — any technical issue requiring root cause analysis before fix
